'''maluvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabe|rabe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabe|rabe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maluvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mælivith|mælivith]] || [[word:mælivij|mælivij]] || [[word:mælivish|mælivish]] || [[word:mælivi|mælivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maluluvuth|maluluvuth]] || [[word:maluluvuj|maluluvuj]] || [[word:maluluvush|maluluvush]] || [[word:maluluvu|maluluvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maluvuth|maluvuth]] || [[word:maluvuj|maluvuj]] || [[word:maluvush|maluvush]] || [[word:maluvu|maluvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:malufvuth|malufvuth]] || [[word:malufvuj|malufvuj]] || [[word:malufvush|malufvush]] || [[word:malufvuf|malufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maluvuthu|maluvuthu]] || [[word:maluvuju|maluvuju]] || [[word:maluvushu|maluvushu]] || [[word:maluvuku|maluvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maluvuth|maluvuth]] || [[word:maluvuj|maluvuj]] || [[word:maluvush|maluvush]] || [[word:maluvu|maluvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maluvuthul|maluvuthul]] || [[word:maluvujul|maluvujul]] || [[word:maluvushul|maluvushul]] || [[word:maluvukul|maluvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maluvuthuthu|maluvuthuthu]] || [[word:maluvujuju|maluvujuju]] || [[word:maluvushushu|maluvushushu]] || [[word:maluvuku|maluvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maluvuthun|maluvuthun]] || [[word:maluvujun|maluvujun]] || [[word:maluvushun|maluvushun]] || [[word:maluvukun|maluvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maluvuthuoro|maluvuthuoro]] || [[word:maluvujuoro|maluvujuoro]] || [[word:maluvushuoro|maluvushuoro]] || [[word:maluvukuoro|maluvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
